## `r er$code` — `r er$name` (`r round(er$area_km2)` km²)

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap=paste0(er$code, " (", er$name, ") within the FWCP Peace Region. Highlighted polygon is the analysis AOI for this section."), fig.height=5}
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = aoi, fill = "#f5f5f5", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_sf(data = er, fill = "#fdbf6f", color = "#e6550d", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_sf(data = lakes, fill = "#a6bddb", color = "#74a9cf", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_sf(data = highways, color = "#333333", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_sf(data = towns, color = "black", size = 1.8) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data = towns, aes(label = name, geometry = geom),
    stat = "sf_coordinates", size = 2.8, fill = "white", alpha = 0.85
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(aoi_bb["xmin"] - 0.4, aoi_bb["xmax"] + 0.4),
    ylim = c(aoi_bb["ymin"] - 0.5, aoi_bb["ymax"] + 0.3)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank())
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
knitr::kable(cd_summary(res$trn[res$trn$period == "annual", ]),
  caption = paste0("Annual trend statistics — ", er$code, "."),
  digits = 3)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap=paste0("Annual mean temperature anomaly — ", er$code, " (", er$name, ").")}
cd_plot_timeseries(
  res$ano, variable = "tmean", period = "annual", trend = res$trn,
  title = paste0("Annual Mean Temperature Anomaly — ", er$code)
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap=paste0("Annual precipitation anomaly (% of 1951-1980 baseline) — ", er$code, ".")}
cd_plot_timeseries(
  res$ano, variable = "prcp", period = "annual", trend = res$trn,
  title = paste0("Annual Precipitation Anomaly — ", er$code)
)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
knitr::kable(res$cmp_pct,
  caption = paste0("Recent (2015-2025) vs pre-warming (1951-1980), percent change for prcp and soil moisture — ", er$code, "."),
  digits = 1)
```
